allow: Bash(python .claude/skills/qiuzhi-creative/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt 'A minimalist Instagram square post for Qiuzhi Restaurant. Clean white space composition with soft muted color palette, warm ivory and light sage tones. Modern elegant typography with thin-stroke Chinese and English text. Incorporate the mint-colored brand logo as a subtle element. Refined, serene, contemporary aesthetic evoking premium casual dining. Sparse layout with intentional negative space. Social media ready.' --ratio 1:1 --size 2K --out outputs/qiuzhi_ig_square.png)

Bash(python .claude/skills/qiuzhi-creative/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt "A minimalist Instagram square post for Qiuzhi Restaurant. Clean white space composition with soft muted color palette, warm ivory and light sage tones. Modern elegant typography with thin-stroke Chinese and English text. Incorporate the mint-colored brand logo as a subtle element. Refined, serene, contemporary aesthetic evoking premium casual dining. Sparse layout with intentional negative space." --out outputs/qiuzhi_ig_square.png)

Bash(python .claude/skills/qiuzhi-creative/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt 'A refined restaurant menu cover for Qiuzhi Restaurant. Portrait orientation, abundant white space, minimal elegant composition. Soft ivory or off-white background. Delicate thin-line decorative elements. Restaurant name in both Chinese and English with refined serif or thin sans-serif typography. Subtle incorporation of the mint-green brand logo. No food photography — pure typographic and graphic design. Feels premium, serene, and contemporary.' --out outputs/qiuzhi_menu_cover.png)

Bash(python .claude/skills/qiuzhi-creative/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt 'A restaurant menu cover for Qiuzhi Restaurant with an appetizing, mouth-watering aesthetic. Portrait orientation. Warm, rich tones — deep amber, burnt sienna, earthy greens. Lush food photography mood with close-up textures of fresh seasonal ingredients subtly blended into the composition. Restaurant name in elegant Chinese and English typography. Mint-green logo incorporated naturally. Modern yet inviting, evoking freshness and culinary craft. Makes the viewer hungry at first glance.' --out outputs/qiuzhi_menu_cover_v2.png)

Bash(python .claude/skills/qiuzhi-creative/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt 'A restaurant menu cover for Qiuzhi Restaurant. Portrait 3:4 format. Warm, appetizing aesthetic with rich visual layers. Hero composition featuring signature dishes — beautifully plated food with seasonal autumn imagery: warm amber tones, fallen leaves, earthy textures. Close-up food photography feel with depth and richness. Restaurant name 秋芝餐廳 and Qiuzhi Restaurant in refined typography. Mint-green logo subtly placed. Inviting, lush, makes the viewer crave the food immediately.' --out outputs/qiuzhi_menu_cover_v3.png)

Bash(python .claude/skills/qiuzhi-creative/scripts/generate_image.py --prompt 'A minimalist restaurant menu cover for Qiuzhi Restaurant featuring the signature grilled fish. Portrait format. Abundant white space, soft ivory background. A single beautifully plated whole grilled fish as the hero element, styled with elegant simplicity — fresh herbs, delicate garnish, clean plate. Refined thin-stroke typography displaying 秋芝餐廳 and Qiuzhi Restaurant. Mint-green logo placed subtly. No clutter, serene and premium feel, like a high-end Japanese restaurant menu.' --out outputs/qiuzhi_menu_grilled_fish.png)
